_comment: No secrets here. Credentials + ELEVENLABS_API_KEY come from the environment (.env in dev, or your service manager in prod). tts_mode 'unifi' = native Protect TTS (clean, robotic voice) and is the reliable default. Talkback streaming garbles on Protect 7.1.x, so ElevenLabs-via-talkback is opt-in (set 'elevenlabs_then_unifi'). Sound-effect files still use talkback (the only path for arbitrary audio on the horn). Find device IDs/MAC with: GET https://<nvr>/proxy/protect/api/bootstrap (see docs/CONTROLLING-UNIFI-PROTECT-AUDIO.md).
